title: The box model
description: Every element is a box: content, padding, border, margin.

questions.prompt: Which layer sits OUTSIDE the border?
questions.explanation: Order from inside out: content, padding, border, margin.

options: The line drawn around an element
questions.explanation: Padding is the inner spacing, inside the border.

questions.prompt: With the default box-sizing, how WIDE (in pixels) does this <div> render?
The DEFAULT value of box-sizing is:
questions.explanation: Default: content-box. Modern resets switch to border-box for predictability.
Inside → outside: content, padding, border, margin.

questions.prompt: Which does NOT paint background color?
questions.explanation: Margin is fully transparent; background stops at the border.

questions.prompt: What is the OUTER width including margin?
questions.explanation: border-box → width=200 includes padding+border. Total incl. margin = 200 + 2×10 = 220.

questions.prompt: outline vs border — the key difference:
options: outline draws inside; border draws outside
outline doesn't affect layout (no space reserved); border does
border is animatable; outline is not
questions.explanation: outline overlays. Perfect for focus rings.
